message:
fix(command,conformance): use UnknownSubcommand for CLUSTER fallback and add select(0) test

- CLUSTER command now returns proper UnknownSubcommand error instead of
  ad-hoc error string for unrecognized subcommands
- Add conformance test for EVAL select(0) which should error with
  "index out of range" per Lua 5.1 spec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
